title: Lead Investment Banker at Angel One

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Angel One
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Angel One in Nagpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Angel One:
Angel One is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Angel One!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
